title: orthochilus ensatus
intro: Orthochilus ensatus, also known as the spiny orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The spiny orchid has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of Orthochilus ensatus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve symptoms and promote overall well-being.
